data_entry.label: Data Entry
data_entry.description: Sort a scrambled list into alphabetical order.

quality_control.label: Quality Control
quality_control.description: Find the incorrect word or typo in a text block.

logistics.label: Logistics
logistics.description: Match items to their correct categories.

transaction_actions.coinflip: flipped a coin and changed their wallet by {amount} {currency}
transaction_actions.dice: rolled dice and changed their wallet by {amount} {currency}
transaction_actions.loan_snatch: had an overdue loan snatched for {amount_abs} {currency}

currency.name: Human-readable currency name used in plain English transaction files. Cosmetic only.

accounts.starting_wallet: Wallet balance assigned to newly created accounts. Increase for a starter bonus.
accounts.starting_bank: Bank balance assigned to newly created accounts. Increase for a protected starter bonus.

daily.cooldown_hours: Hours users must wait between daily claims. Lower values give currency faster.
daily.min_reward: Smallest possible daily reward. Must be <= max_reward.
daily.max_reward: Largest possible daily reward. Raising this inflates the economy.

weekly.cooldown_days: Days users must wait between weekly claims.
weekly.min_reward: Smallest possible weekly reward. Must be <= max_reward.
weekly.max_reward: Largest possible weekly reward. Raising this inflates the economy.

beg.win_chance: Probability from 0.0 to 1.0 that beg succeeds. Example: 0.1 is 10%.

gambling.min_bet: Minimum wager accepted by gambling commands.
gambling.coinflip_profit_multiplier: Profit multiplier when coinflip wins. 1 means a 100 bet pays 100 profit and returns the original through unchanged balance math.
gambling.dice_payout_multiplier: Total payout multiplier for an exact dice guess. 6 means a 100 bet returns 600 total / 500 profit.

pay.tax_threshold: Payment amount where high tax starts. Amounts below use low_tax_rate; amounts at/above use high_tax_rate.

loan.term_days: Number of days before unpaid loans are forcibly collected.
loan.total_interest_rate: Total interest added to borrowed amount. 0.25 means repay 125% total.
loan.installment_principal_rate: Portion of original principal charged per pay_loan installment.
loan.installment_interest_rate: Interest portion of original principal charged per pay_loan installment.
loan.round_due_to_next_hour: If true, due dates round up to the next full UTC hour for readability.
loan.snatch_bank_first: If true, overdue collection takes bank funds before wallet funds.
loan.allow_negative_wallet_on_snatch: If true, overdue collection can push wallet below zero.

leaderboard.limit: Number of users displayed on the leaderboard. Discord embeds work best at 10 or fewer.

stock_market.stock_key: Internal JSON key for the fictional stock. Changing after launch can orphan old holdings.
stock_market.display_name: Public stock name shown to users.
stock_market.starting_price: Initial price when a server market is created.
stock_market.update_interval_seconds: Minimum seconds between random price updates.
stock_market.min_percent_change: Lowest random percentage movement per update. Negative values allow drops.
stock_market.max_percent_change: Highest random percentage movement per update. Positive values allow gains.

transactions.enabled: Master switch for compact transaction .txt logging.
transactions.directory: Folder where transaction part files are stored.
transactions.max_part_size_bytes: Maximum raw text size before rolling part 1 to part 2. 9500000 is 9.5 MB.
transactions.max_parts: Maximum transaction parts retained per guild before oldest is deleted.
transactions.history_command_lines: Number of recent compact log lines shown by the transaction command.

work.jobs_category_name: Existing category where private job channels are created. If missing, create_category_if_missing controls behavior.
work.create_category_if_missing: If true, bot creates the jobs category when it cannot find it.
work.selection_timeout_seconds: How long the dropdown remains usable.
work.task_timeout_seconds: How long a user has to solve a private job task.
work.delete_channel_after_seconds: Delay before completed/failed job channels are deleted.

data_entry.label: Dropdown label for this job.
data_entry.min_reward: Minimum reward for completing this job.
data_entry.max_reward: Maximum reward for completing this job.
data_entry.min_account_age_days: Minimum Discord account age required. 0 disables age gating.
data_entry.required_role_names: List of role names required for this job. Empty list means everyone can select it.

quality_control.label: Dropdown label for this job.
quality_control.min_reward: Minimum reward for completing this job.
quality_control.max_reward: Maximum reward for completing this job.
quality_control.min_account_age_days: Minimum Discord account age required. 0 disables age gating.
quality_control.required_role_names: List of role names required for this job. Empty list means everyone can select it.

logistics.label: Dropdown label for this job.
logistics.min_reward: Minimum reward for completing this job.
logistics.max_reward: Maximum reward for completing this job.
logistics.min_account_age_days: Minimum Discord account age required. 0 disables age gating.
logistics.required_role_names: List of role names required for this job. Empty list means everyone can select it.

emojis.coin_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.
emojis.wave_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.

emojis.trophy_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.
emojis.bank_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.
emojis.scroll_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.
emojis.briefcase_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.
emojis.success_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.
emojis.failure_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.
emojis.dice_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.
emojis.money_bag_emoji: Discord colon-code emoji string used by bot responses. Use official Discord format like :coin:, not raw Unicode.

transaction_actions.create_account: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `create_account`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.daily: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `daily`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.weekly: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `weekly`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.beg: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `beg`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.deposit: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `deposit`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.withdraw: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `withdraw`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.coinflip: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `coinflip`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.dice: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `dice`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.pay_sent: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `pay_sent`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.pay_received: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `pay_received`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.loan_borrow: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `loan_borrow`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.loan_payment: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `loan_payment`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.loan_snatch: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `loan_snatch`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.stock_buy: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `stock_buy`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.stock_sell: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `stock_sell`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.
transaction_actions.work: Plain-English phrase used when formatting raw transaction action `work`. Supports placeholders like {amount}, {amount_abs}, and {currency}.

localization.transaction_unknown_action: Fallback phrase used for any raw action key not listed in transaction_actions.
localization.transaction_line_format: Final readable transaction line wrapper. Controls timestamp/user/action/balance layout. Supports {timestamp}, {user}, {action}, {wallet}, and {bank}.
